title: hibbertia elata
intro: Hibbertia elata, also known as the Alpine Copperflower, is a low-growing, prostrate shrub native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hibbertia elata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and infections. Hibbertia elata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
